parameters.query: SELECT 'Ronin' AS kid_label, 'deadlines-ronin' AS topic, type,title,due_at,amount FROM intake_items WHERE type IN ('event','due') AND student IN ('ronin','both') AND due_at >= now() AND due_at <= now() + interval '48 hours' ORDER BY due_at;

SELECT 'Rory' AS kid_label, 'deadlines-rory' AS topic, type,title,due_at,amount FROM intake_items WHERE type IN ('event','due') AND student IN ('rory','both') AND due_at >= now() AND due_at <= now() + interval '48 hours' ORDER BY due_at;
